description: Note from a certain Mūsā to a notable. In Judaeo-Arabic. Dating: Likely ca. 13th century (the hand may be known). The sender reminds the addressee to fulfill a promise (the details of which are only alluded to). "The only thing that prevented me from coming in person was removing a burden from your noble mind."
description_he: מכתב ביהודית-ערבית. מוחזק בבית המדרש לרבנים.
